description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a white perimeter fence and landscaped with several trees and shrubs. The front facade features large, horizontally-aligned windows and a double garage with a driveway leading to the street. The main entrance is centrally located, opening onto a spacious lawn and garden area. The rear of the bungalow includes additional large windows and sliding doors, providing access to the backyard. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of blue and white, with clean, geometric lines and minimal ornamentation. The property includes a paved driveway, a garage, and ample green space on all sides.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a double garage, surrounded by a white fence and landscaped gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, driveway, and large front lawn with trees.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the backyard, side garden, and the garage extending towards the street.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the wide rear windows, sliding doors, and spacious backyard with trees.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the side entrance, additional windows, and the continuation of the garden and fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and rear facades
